feature_description: Age of the user in years.
Biological sex of the user: male or female.
Total number of completed orders placed by the user. Indicates customer activity, loyalty and frequency.
Total money spent by the user across all orders. Indicates high value customer behavior and monetary value.
Average value of a single order. Indicates expensive orders, high check size and premium purchase behavior.
Number of orders placed in the last 30 days. Indicates recent activity and active customers.
Number of orders placed in the last 90 days. Indicates medium-term activity and order history.
Number of days since last order. Indicates inactivity, recency decay, lapsed users and reactivation need.
Share of orders with discounts, coupons or promotions. Indicates promotion sensitivity and discount response.
Share of orders placed during evening hours, dinner time or after-work meals.
Share of orders placed during weekends, leisure occasions, family meals or social activity.
Share of orders delivered to the user's location. Indicates delivery preference and remote ordering behavior.
Share of orders picked up by the user instead of delivered. Indicates pickup preference.
Share of orders from repeated places or repeated choices. Indicates loyalty, habit and consistency.
Share of interactions with beer-tagged items or entities. Indicates beer-related product interest.
Share of interactions with pork-tagged items or entities. Indicates pork-related product interest.
Share of interactions with beef-tagged items or entities. Indicates beef, grill or meat-related interest.
Share of interactions with spicy-tagged items or entities. Indicates interest in spicy taste characteristics.
Share of interactions with Ukrainian-tagged items or entities. Indicates local cuisine or Ukrainian category interest.
Share of interactions with kids food tagged items or entities. Indicates family or children-oriented food behavior.
Share of interactions with salad-tagged items or entities. Indicates salad, lighter food or fresh option interest.
Share of interactions with seafood tagged items such as fish, shrimp or seafood category entities.
Share of interactions with meat-heavy tagged items such as grill, barbecue, chicken or meat categories.
Share of interactions with healthy, balanced, fitness-oriented or low-calorie tagged options.
Share of interactions with fast food or quick-service tagged items and entities.
Share of interactions with desserts, sweets, cakes, pastries or bakery tagged items.
Share of interactions with coffee, beverages, cafe products or coffee-shop tagged items.
Share of interactions with alcohol tagged items such as beer, wine, cocktails or alcoholic beverages.
Share of interactions with fine dining, premium restaurants, high-end dining or luxury dining entities.
Share of high-price orders indicating premium products, expensive purchases or high-value behavior.
Share of orders suitable for groups, shared meals, large portions, events or social dining occasions.
Number of app sessions in the last 30 days. Indicates recent engagement and activity.
Average number of orders placed per week. Indicates frequency and active usage.
